title: lomandra elongata
intro: Lomandra elongata, also known as the yellow flag or blue flag lily, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lomandra elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lomandra elongata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, and can also be dried and used in capsule or tablet form.
